ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade proposal */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was proposed */,
  "proposing_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the proposing team */,
  "accepting_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accepting team */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., proposed, accepted, rejected) */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total monetary value of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., player-only, cash-only, mixed) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league where the trade is proposed */,
  "trade_deadline" TEXT /* Date and time by which the trade must be accepted or rejected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_proposing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_accepting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("accepting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_budget" REAL /* Current budget of the team */,
  "team_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins the team has in the current season */,
  "team_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses the team has in the current season */,
  "team_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties the team has in the current season */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "manager_role" TEXT /* Role of the manager (e.g., team manager, league commissioner) */,
  "manager_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the manager based on performance */,
  "manager_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in managing fantasy teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "value" REAL /* Market value of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured) */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics (e.g., batting average, ERA) */,
  "player_contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  "player_draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in which the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_players" (
  "trade_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade player entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated trade proposal */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the trade */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that holds the player */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Loan amount associated with the trade */,
  "injured_list" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is on the injured list */,
  "player_performance_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the player's performance on the trade value */,
  "player_trade_value" REAL /* Individual value of the player in the trade */,
  "player_loan_period" TEXT /* Duration of the loan period if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_players_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the league */,
  "league_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "league_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_rules" TEXT /* Description of the league rules and regulations */,
  "league_commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_league_commissioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_commissioner_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traded proposal */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was finalized */,
  "finalized_amount" REAL /* Finalized monetary value for the trade */,
  "trade_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trade on team performance */,
  "trade_evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of the trade by the league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_negotiations" (
  "negotiation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each negotiation entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade proposal being negotiated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message exchanged between teams */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the message was sent */,
  "negotiator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager who sent the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager who received the message */,
  "negotiation_status" TEXT /* Status of the negotiation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("negotiation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_negotiations_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_negotiations_negotiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("negotiator_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_negotiations_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade proposal this condition applies to */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., performance-based, injury-based) */,
  "condition_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the condition to be met */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_conditions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan record */,
  "trade_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade player this loan applies to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money loaned */,
  "loan_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the loan */,
  "loan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loan */,
  "loan_interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate on the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_trade_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_player_id") REFERENCES trade_players ("trade_player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injured player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., day-to-day, out) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from injury */,
  "injury_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade report */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade proposal this report relates to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the trade activities */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trade summary, performance analysis) */,
  "report_author" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager who generated the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Audience for the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_reports_report_author FOREIGN KEY ("report_author") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_reports_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
